# init(envelope:)

**Initializer**

Creates the distance model parameters with an envelope.

## Declaration

```swift
init(envelope: PHASEEnvelope)
```

## Parameters

- **envelope**: The envelope that shapes sound dissipation over distance.
title: init(envelope:)
